title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz Life in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz Life:
Bajaj Allianz Life is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life!
